## CustomConstraintRegistration.compositionRule property

How this constraint composes with other constraints of the same kind. - "intersect": combine with logical AND (both must hold) - "override": last writer wins

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly compositionRule: "intersect" | "override";
```
